jobs.title: Scientist C, D, E (Lateral Recruitment Scheme)

jobs.fitLabel: B.Tech Mechanical Engineering is an eligible degree for some Scientist posts in DRDO. However, the candidate is primarily interested in Management and IT roles, not core mechanical engineering. IT posts requiring CS/IT/Electronics degrees would be 'gated' for this candidate.

jobs.title: Scientist C (Mechanical Engineering)

jobs.fitLabel: Core mechanical engineering role, which is not the candidate's primary interest. However, the candidate has a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering and meets the experience requirement.

jobs.fitLabel: IT/CS/Electronics role, which aligns with the candidate's interest and software engineering experience, but the candidate lacks the required CS/IT/Electronics degree (has B.Tech Mechanical).

jobs.title: CRP Specialist Officers (CRP SPL-XVI) - Management Roles
jobs.summary: The Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS) has released the official notification for the Common Recruitment Process for Specialist Officers (CRP SPL-XVI) for 745 vacancies in participating public sector banks for the financial year 2027-28. Online applications are invited for various Specialist Officer posts including HR/Personnel Officer, Rajbhasha Adhikari, and Marketing Officer. The selection process includes Preliminary and Main Examinations, followed by an Interview.
jobs.fitLabel: Strong: Management-related specialist roles (HR/Personnel Officer, Rajbhasha Adhikari, Marketing Officer) are a good fit for the candidate's interest in management, assuming a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering is an accepted qualification for these roles.

jobs.title: CRP Probationary Officers/Management Trainees (CRP PO/MT-XVI)

Eligible candidates with a Bachelor's degree in any discipline can apply online. The selection process includes Preliminary and Main Examinations, followed by an Interview.
jobs.fitLabel: Strong: This is an any-graduate management exam, which is a strong fit for the candidate's profile and interest in management roles.

jobs.title: Specialists on Contract Recruitment 2026

jobs.fitLabel: The IT-related roles (Data Architect, Application Solution Architect, Technology Solution Architect) are likely gated as most government IT posts require a CS/IT/Electronics degree, which the candidate (B.Tech Mechanical) does not possess. Other specialist roles (Carbon Consultant, Climate Change Specialist - Mitigation, Specialist- Derivatives and Treasury Risk Management) are highly specialized and not a direct fit for the candidate's primary interest in general management or IT roles.
